title: Middle Eastern Yellow Pea Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious pilaf made with yellow split peas, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. This Middle Eastern-inspired dish is packed with protein and fiber.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the cumin and coriander and stir for 1 minute.
Add the yellow split peas and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the festive Middle Eastern rice and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
